series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with permits to allow persons to have duck blinds on state parks. This series includes, but is not limited to: any registration information, fees, fines, or other records related to duck blind permits.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor, then destroy. If paper records are scanned an saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
